info.title: ManuComp AI API
info.description: API for ManuComp AI - Competency Management System with AI/LLM capabilities

post.description: Authenticate user and return an access token.

get.description: List all employees with pagination and filters.
Get employee details with competency summary.
List all roles with pagination and search.
List all competencies with pagination and filters.
List all assessments with pagination and filters.

schema.title: Response Bulk Create Assessments Api V1 Assessments Bulk Post

get.description: Get competency gap analysis for a specific employee. (Manager/Admin only)
Get role readiness for a specific employee. (Manager/Admin only)

schema.title: Response Get Employee Role Readiness Api V1 Analytics Role Readiness  Employee Id  Get

get.description: Get overall dashboard summary for managers/admins.

post.description: Submit a natural language query to the AI for insights. (Manager/Admin only)
Request AI-driven insights on specific employees or competencies. (Manager/Admin only)
Get AI-driven suggestions for competencies required for a specific role. (Manager/Admin only)
Suggest competencies for an employee to develop based on their gaps. (Manager/Admin only)
Recommend learning paths for an employee to improve a specific competency. (Manager/Admin only)
Analyze feedback text for sentiment, themes, and key points. (Manager/Admin only)

get.description: Detailed health check including database connectivity.
